## Summary

Describe the user-facing or developer-facing change.

## Verification

List the commands, tests, or manual checks you ran.

## Safety

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, private user data, or production service internals are included.
- [ ] Production Supabase schema, migrations, Edge Functions, billing internals, and deployment configuration are not included.
- [ ] License, notice, or attribution updates are included when needed.
